category_sources: source_facts.description says iccdev provides developer tools for interacting with and manipulating ICC profiles.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage/repo use the official project name iccDEV.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official repository; its README is the primary available documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an official repository URL, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ICC profile manipulation; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools for profile conversion, dumping, visualization, and application.
